ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead for the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead_id") REFERENCES team_leads ("lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the experiment */,
  "regret_bound" REAL /* Regret bound of the experiment */,
  "incumbent_val_metric" REAL /* Incumbent validation metric of the experiment */,
  "incumbent_test_metric" REAL /* Incumbent test metric of the experiment */,
  "gp_noise_var" REAL /* Gaussian process noise variance of the experiment */,
  "total_train_time" REAL /* Total training time of the experiment in seconds */,
  "model_architecture" INTEGER /* ID of the model architecture used in the experiment */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the experiment */,
  "data_split" TEXT /* Data split used in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used in the experiment */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the experiment */,
  "external_tool_integrated" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if any external tools were integrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_architecture FOREIGN KEY ("model_architecture") REFERENCES model_architectures ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_leads" (
  "lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team lead */,
  "lead_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team lead */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team lead */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the team lead belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team lead was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team lead's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_architectures" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model architecture */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model architecture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model architecture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model architecture was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model architecture was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparam_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data split */,
  "split_name" TEXT /* Name of the data split */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data split */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data split was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data split was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_hyperparameters" (
  "experiment_hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-hyperparameter mapping */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter for the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_hyperparameters_hyperparam_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparam_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_data_splits" (
  "experiment_split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-data split mapping */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "split_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data split */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_splits_split_id FOREIGN KEY ("split_id") REFERENCES data_splits ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_splits_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-user mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-tag mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tags_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the external tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external tool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tool was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tool was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_external_tools" (
  "experiment_tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment-external tool mapping */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external tool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_tool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_external_tools_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_external_tools_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES external_tools ("tool_id")
)
